summary: Sync the headline /results-report endpoint (and store /recommendations) as single envelopes under a fixed key; results-report replaces the ID-less /results list in the default sync set.
reason: loadAllResults reads resource_type='results-report' but sync only fetched /results (ID-less, stored 0 rows), so every transcend command (PDF, trends, goat, oscillating, recs) had no data. This is retro item #3, which was believed worked-around but was live and unfixed.
validated_outcome: Live full sync stores results-report=1 and recommendations=1; PDF/trends/recs now return real data.

deferred_to_upstream.feature: Single-envelope (non-paginated, ID-less) resources should be sync-able without a per-CLI special-case
deferred_to_upstream.reason: The generic pagination/ID-extraction path drops single-object endpoints like results-report and recommendations; the generator should recognize the spec's report endpoint as the sync target.
